title: Cert Execution Completed Event
description: Emitted when a certification test execution is completed in the verification system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

execution_id.description: Unique identifier of the test execution.

cert_project_id.description: Identifier of the associated certification project.

status.description: Overall status of the certification execution.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the execution was completed.

test_items.description: List of test items included in the execution.

duration_days.description: Total duration of the execution in days.

lab.description: Name or identifier of the testing laboratory.

operator.description: Name or identifier of the operator who performed the execution.

remarks.description: Additional remarks or notes about the execution.

report_url.description: URL to the detailed test execution report.
